text:
(In reply to Ronald Klop from comment #2)
Possibly that might be the issue. Now I am not able to repro on the instance I had reported issue. Even after reverting the workaround, it is working fine. Also, on new instance it worked fine. So that might be some html error page. I don't have meta.conf available now. If it gets reproduced on next time, I will check that.

Thank you for your response.
